---
title: "AI for Coding"
sidebar: false
---

{{< include materials.qmd >}}

## Schedule & Plan

**Morning Course — In Person and Virtual** [Join Teams Channel](https://teams.microsoft.com/meet/27612063989198?p=jK5O2M12JmSoQGPFcg)

| Session | Date | Time (ET) |
|---------|------|-----------|
| 1 | Mon Apr 20 | 9:00 AM–12:00 PM |
| 2 | Thu Apr 23 | 9:00 AM–12:00 PM |

**Evening Course (Repeat) — Virtual** [Join Teams Channel](https://teams.microsoft.com/meet/22792960965888?p=7H3zxnQKgcG0elimZb)

| Session | Date | Time (ET) | Time Jakarta (GMT+7) |
|---------|------|-----------|---------|
| 1 | Mon Apr 20 | 9:00 PM–12:00 AM | Tue Apr 21, 9:00 AM–12:00 PM |
| 2 | Thu Apr 23 | 9:00 PM–12:00 AM | Fri Apr 24, 9:00 AM–12:00 PM |
